infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find nearby rides and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to find nearby rides and track your trip in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app uses your location to find nearby rides and track your trip in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app uses your location to find nearby rides and show your position on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app uses your location to track your trip even when the app is in the background.
